subject: FW: Message to Jeffrey
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: darlene das [mailto:darlene.das42@gmail.com] 
Sent: Monday, May 26, 2008 12:26 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: Message to Jeffrey


Lesley  

Me too!  Will Jeffrey be in the City, on Wednesday?  City meaning
NYC...LOL!  



hope you had a pleasant Memmorial Day weekend!

Darlene 


On Mon, May 26, 2008 at 5:56 AM, Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
wrote:


	Hello Darlene.  I hope your meeting with Mattel goes really well
for you.!
	 
	Lesley
	 
	 
	 
	 
	 
	 
	Lesley Groff
	Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
	 
	 

________________________________

	From: darlene das [mailto:darlene.das42@gmail.com] 
	Sent: Saturday, May 24, 2008 9:05 AM
	To: Lesley Groff
	Subject: Re: Message to Jeffrey
	
	
	Lesley, 


	I just wanted to say " MANISH MA"  (phonetically  in hebrew )
that means how are you doing?  

	And YOU?

	I have a meeting with a trademark attorney this week coming.

	I am so ready to get to Mattel and have another life.


	Cheers!

	Darlene
